_comment: flagd watches this file and reloads on change - flip defaultVariant from 'off' to 'on' and the feature goes live with NO redeploy (`make flag-flip` does this). See pipelines/adr-wk05-ci-cd.md Decision 3 for why PATCH /incidents/{id} status validation is wrapped. Run flagd: `flagd start --uri file:./deploy/flags/flags.json`.
